ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.quality_notes: High quality text-based PDF. Original certificate on page 1, copies on pages 2–3. Pages 4–6 contain the invoice embedded within the certificate file.

invoice.quality_notes: High quality text-based PDF. 3 pages. Identical content to the invoice embedded in the certificate file (pages 4–6). This is the separate invoice file and is the authoritative verification document per rule 8.5.0.

document_pairing.method: Certificate file (Document A, pages 1–3) contains the certificate. Invoice file (Document B, pages 1–3) contains the invoice. Certificate references invoice 61622218/1S dated 25/02/2026. Invoice file contains invoice 61622218/1S dated 2026-02-25. Pairing confirmed via invoice number match, consignor match, and consignee match.
document_pairing.sanity_check_details: Criterion 1: Certificate references invoice 61622218/1S — invoice file contains 61622218/1S → PASS. Criterion 2: Certificate consignor 'AB Volvo Penta' matches invoice issuer 'AB Volvo Penta' → PASS. Criterion 3: Certificate consignee 'ORASCOM FREE ZONE' matches invoice consignee 'ORASCOM FREE ZONE' → PASS.

locations: Document B, page 1: 'AB Volvo Penta' in Legal Company Address block
Document B, page 1: 'AB Volvo Penta' in Mu Office info block
Document B, page 1: 'AB Volvo Penta (VAT reg Germany)' in Tax ID/Tax Agent block
Document B, page 1: 'VOLVO PENTA' in header branding
Document B, page 2: same blocks repeated
Document B, page 3: same blocks repeated

lc_check.motivation: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The references VP48500485 / YI65744 in remarks field and SEG-26D-463229 as certificate number do not contain LC-related banking terminology. Verification proceeds with all checkpoints.

checkpoints.certificate_value: AB Volvo Penta, Terminalvägen, ARK-S, Gropegårdsgatan 11, SE-405 08, Gothenburg, Sweden
checkpoints.invoice_value: AB Volvo Penta, Gropegårdsgatan 11, 40508 Göteborg, Sweden (Legal Company Address)

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name 'AB Volvo Penta' anywhere in invoice file.
comparison_steps.result: FOUND. 'AB Volvo Penta' appears in Legal Company Address block, Mu Office info block, Tax ID/Tax Agent block, and header branding on all pages of the invoice.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate consignor: 'AB Volvo Penta'. Invoice issuer (Legal Company Address): 'AB Volvo Penta'. Exact match after normalization.
Certificate: Sweden. Invoice Legal Company Address: Sweden. Exact match.

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur – consignor name found in invoice.
Name and country verification – direct match.

evidence.source: Invoice, page 1, Legal Company Address block
Invoice, page 1, Legal Company Address block

checkpoints.motivation: Certificate consignor 'AB Volvo Penta' is identical to the invoice issuer 'AB Volvo Penta' in the Legal Company Address block. Country Sweden matches exactly. Direct MATCH without need for further normalization steps.
checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 1: 'AB Volvo Penta ... Sweden'. Invoice Legal Company Address: 'AB Volvo Penta, Gropegårdsgatan 11, 40508 Göteborg, Sweden'. Name match: exact. Country match: exact. Address difference (Terminalvägen/ARK-S in cert vs only Gropegårdsgatan 11 in invoice) is irrelevant per rule 4.1.5 – address differences do not cause MISMATCH.

checkpoints.certificate_value: ORASCOM FREE ZONE, EL AMIRIA, ALEXANDRIA, ACID: 2024830102025120035, Tax ID: 202483010, Egypt
checkpoints.invoice_value: Consignee: ORASCOM FREE ZONE EL AMIRIA ALEXANDRIA Egypt; Invoice Address: Orascom Trading, 162B, 26Th July Street, Agouza, CAIRO, Egypt

comparison_steps.step: 4.2.0.2 – Priority identification of consignee in invoice
comparison_steps.description: Invoice contains both an 'Invoice Address' field (Orascom Trading, Cairo, Egypt) and a dedicated 'Consignee' field (ORASCOM FREE ZONE EL AMIRIA ALEXANDRIA Egypt). Certificate consignee is 'ORASCOM FREE ZONE EL AMIRIA ALEXANDRIA Egypt'.
comparison_steps.result: Invoice has a dedicated 'Consignee' field which is a primary field. Certificate consignee matches this field exactly.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: 'ORASCOM FREE ZONE EL AMIRIA ALEXANDRIA'. Invoice Consignee field: 'ORASCOM FREE ZONE EL AMIRIA ALEXANDRIA'. Exact match after normalization.
Certificate: Egypt. Invoice Consignee: Egypt. Exact match.
Certificate ACID: 2024830102025120035, Tax ID: 202483010. Invoice: ACID:2024830102025120035, Egyptian Importer Tax ID: 202483010. Both identifiers match exactly.

rules_applied.description: Priority identification – invoice has a dedicated Consignee field.

checkpoints.motivation: Certificate consignee 'ORASCOM FREE ZONE EL AMIRIA ALEXANDRIA, Egypt' is found exactly in the invoice's dedicated Consignee field: 'ORASCOM FREE ZONE EL AMIRIA ALEXANDRIA Egypt'. Country Egypt matches. ACID and Tax ID identifiers corroborate the match. The Invoice Address 'Orascom Trading' is a different entity (the billing party), but the invoice explicitly designates ORASCOM FREE ZONE as the Consignee, which is the correct verification target.
checkpoints.debug_explanation: The invoice has both an Invoice Address (Orascom Trading, Cairo) and a Consignee field (ORASCOM FREE ZONE, Alexandria). Per 4.2.0.2, the invoice has a dedicated Consignee field which serves as primary identification. Certificate consignee matches the invoice Consignee field exactly. No name normalization needed.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MISMATCH because Invoice Address is 'Orascom Trading' which differs from 'ORASCOM FREE ZONE'
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: The invoice has a SEPARATE dedicated 'Consignee' field that exactly matches the certificate consignee. Per 4.2.0.2, this dedicated field takes priority. The Invoice Address is the billing party, not necessarily the consignee.

checkpoints.certificate_value:
13 THU
Industrial Diesel Engine & Accessories
See attached invoice:61622218/1S, dated: 25/02/2026
checkpoints.invoice_value: Marine Leisure Diesel Engine & Accessories (Description of Goods, page 1); Invoice No 61622218/1S, Date 2026-02-25

comparison_steps.description: Certificate does not contain specific article numbers in the goods description field. No article number matching required.

comparison_steps.step: 4.3.3 – Priority 2: Text matching of identity-bearing description
comparison_steps.description: Certificate: 'Industrial Diesel Engine & Accessories'. Invoice: 'Marine Leisure Diesel Engine & Accessories'. The identity-bearing main designation in the certificate is 'Diesel Engine & Accessories'. The word 'Industrial' is a qualifying adjective. The invoice uses 'Marine Leisure Diesel Engine & Accessories'. Both share the core designation 'Diesel Engine & Accessories'. However, 'Industrial' vs 'Marine Leisure' are different qualifying words — this is a textual difference.
comparison_steps.result: Proceed to Priority 3 to verify via invoice reference.

comparison_steps.step: 4.3.5 – Priority 3: General description with invoice reference
comparison_steps.description: Certificate contains 'See attached invoice:61622218/1S, dated: 25/02/2026'. This is an explicit invoice reference. Invoice number: 61622218/1S matches exactly. Date: certificate 25/02/2026 = 2026-02-25 in invoice = exact match after date format normalization. The certificate description 'Industrial Diesel Engine & Accessories' is a general/category description and the invoice contains 'Marine Leisure Diesel Engine & Accessories' — both describe diesel engines and accessories, which is consistent. The invoice content (diesel engines, drives, accessories) is compatible with the certificate's description.

rules_applied.description: General description with invoice reference – certificate contains explicit reference to invoice 61622218/1S dated 25/02/2026 with 'See attached invoice' formula. Invoice reference and date verified. Invoice content is compatible with certificate description.

evidence.description: Certificate goods description and invoice reference
evidence.raw_text:
13 THU
Industrial Diesel Engine & Accessories
See attached invoice:61622218/1S, dated: 25/02/2026

evidence.source: Invoice, page 1, Description of Goods field

checkpoints.motivation: The certificate contains a generalized goods description 'Industrial Diesel Engine & Accessories' combined with an explicit invoice reference: 'See attached invoice:61622218/1S, dated: 25/02/2026'. Per rule 4.3.5, a general description is acceptable when accompanied by an explicit invoice reference with matching number and date. Invoice number 61622218/1S matches exactly. Invoice date 25/02/2026 = 2026-02-25 after normalization. The invoice content (diesel engines, drives, accessories for marine applications) is compatible with the certificate's 'Diesel Engine & Accessories' description — the difference between 'Industrial' and 'Marine Leisure' is subsumed by the general description with invoice reference rule. The invoice is verified as the correct document per the certificate's reference.
checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate: 'Industrial Diesel Engine & Accessories / See attached invoice:61622218/1S, dated: 25/02/2026'. Invoice: Description 'Marine Leisure Diesel Engine & Accessories', No: 61622218/1S, Date: 2026-02-25. Under Priority 2, there is a word difference ('Industrial' vs 'Marine Leisure') which would need careful handling. However, Priority 3 (4.3.5) is fully applicable: the certificate explicitly references the invoice with 'See attached invoice' formula, number matches, date matches. The invoice content (diesel engines, IPS drives, accessories) is consistent with the certificate's general description. Per 4.3.5, no further text matching is required when the invoice reference is verified and content is compatible.

rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Rule 4.3.5 applies: certificate uses a general description with an explicit invoice reference. The invoice reference (number and date) matches exactly. The invoice content is compatible with the description. Under 4.3.5, the general description is verified via the invoice reference without requiring exact text matching.

checkpoints.invoice_value: Total Gross Weight: 4469.00 KG; Qty of Package and Type: 13 Transport Handling Unit

comparison_steps.description: Box 7 contains 'GW 4469 KG'. This is the primary verification quantity per rule 4.4.2.1. Box 6 also contains '13 THU' which is a package/shipment quantity.
comparison_steps.result: Primary: GW 4469 KG from box 7. Secondary: 13 THU from box 6.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: GW 4469 KG. Invoice page 1: Total Gross Weight 4469.00 KG. Numeric value 4469 matches 4469.00 (trailing decimals). Category: GW in certificate = Gross Weight in invoice. Unit: KG matches KG.
Certificate value 4469 (no decimals). Invoice value 4469.00. Truncation of 4469.00 to zero decimals = 4469. Exact match.
Invoice also shows Total Net Weight 3856.18 KG. Certificate does not explicitly state NW. No contradiction — certificate only claims GW. No GW contradiction exists.
Certificate box 6: '13 THU'. Invoice: 'Qty of Package and Type: 13 Transport Handling Unit'. 13 matches 13. THU = Transport Handling Unit. Corroborates.

rules_applied.description: Box 7 value GW 4469 KG is the verification-grounding quantity.
Occurrence check – GW 4469 KG found as Total Gross Weight 4469.00 KG in invoice.
Weight category GW explicitly stated in certificate, matches Gross Weight in invoice.

evidence.source: Invoice, page 1, Total Gross Weight field
Invoice, page 1, Qty of Package and Type field

checkpoints.motivation: Certificate box 7 states GW 4469 KG. Invoice Total Gross Weight is 4469.00 KG. Numeric value matches exactly (4469 = 4469.00 after truncation). Weight category matches (GW = Gross Weight). Unit matches (KG). Additionally, the shipment quantity '13 THU' in certificate box 6 matches '13 Transport Handling Unit' in the invoice. Both primary and secondary quantities are verified.
checkpoints.debug_explanation: Box 7: 'GW 4469 KG'. Invoice: 'Total Gross Weight 4469.00 KG'. 4469 = 4469.00 (truncation allowed). GW = Gross Weight. KG = KG. Direct occurrence match. No need for exceptions 3A–3E. Invoice also shows NW 3856.18 KG — certificate does not claim NW, so no contradiction per 4.4.3.1.

checkpoints.certificate_value: FR, DK, SE, LT, SK, IT, PL, TW
checkpoints.invoice_value: Per-item origins: FR, DK, SE, DE, LT, SK, IT, PL, TW; EU preferential origin declaration

comparison_steps.description: Invoice contains an 'Origin' column per item line on pages 2–3. Origins found: FR (items 40869954, 21233011), DK (items 23172853, 24180372), SE (items 24596110, 24596128, 24596129, 24141904, 23576708, 24125545), DE (item 23408454), LT (items 874414, 21166003, 23561740), SK (items 24824911, 24663774), IT (item 23407160), PL (item 3588206), TW (items 23316639, 23975324). Invoice also contains EU preferential origin declaration in footer.

comparison_steps.step: 4.5 – Verify each certificate origin country in invoice
comparison_steps.description:
Certificate lists: FR, DK, SE, LT, SK, IT, PL, TW. Check each:
- FR: Found in invoice (items 40869954, 21233011) → VERIFIED
- DK: Found in invoice (items 23172853, 24180372) → VERIFIED
- SE: Found in invoice (items 24596110, 24596128, 24596129, 24141904, 23576708, 24125545) → VERIFIED
- LT: Found in invoice (items 874414, 21166003, 23561740) → VERIFIED
- SK: Found in invoice (items 24824911, 24663774) → VERIFIED
- IT: Found in invoice (item 23407160) → VERIFIED
- PL: Found in invoice (item 3588206) → VERIFIED
- TW: Found in invoice (items 23316639, 23975324) → VERIFIED
comparison_steps.result: All 8 certificate origin countries found in invoice.

comparison_steps.step: 4.5.4.1 – Check for extra origins in invoice not in certificate
comparison_steps.description: Invoice contains DE (item 23408454, Clamp kit, exhaust hose) which is NOT listed in certificate's origin field. DE is Germany, an EU member state. Certificate does not explicitly list DE. However, certificate origin field is 'FR, DK, SE, LT, SK, IT, PL, TW' — this lists specific countries, not 'EU'. Need to check if certificate implicitly covers EU origins.
comparison_steps.result: DE is an extra origin in the invoice. Need to assess under 4.5.4.1.

comparison_steps.description: The certificate is an EU Certificate of Origin headed 'EUROPEAN UNION'. The certificate's origin field lists FR, DK, SE, LT, SK, IT, PL, TW. All of FR, DK, SE, LT, SK, IT, PL are EU member states. TW is not EU. The certificate is issued under the EU framework. Per 4.5.4.1.2 (extended application for mixed EU/non-EU lists): Certificate lists a mix of EU and non-EU countries. All certificate countries are found in the invoice. The extra country in the invoice (DE) is an EU member state. Therefore, per 4.5.4.1.2, this is MATCH.

comparison_steps.step: 4.5.4.1 – Verify no extra non-EU origins in invoice
comparison_steps.description: Invoice origins: FR, DK, SE, DE, LT, SK, IT, PL, TW. Certificate origins: FR, DK, SE, LT, SK, IT, PL, TW. Extra in invoice: DE. DE is EU → acceptable per 4.5.4.1.2. TW is in both cert and invoice → not an 'extra' country. No extra non-EU countries in invoice.

rules_applied.description: Origin identified per item in invoice 'Origin' column.
Extended application – mixed EU/non-EU list: all certificate countries found in invoice, extra country DE is EU member state.
ISO country code normalization: FR=France, DK=Denmark, SE=Sweden, LT=Lithuania, SK=Slovakia, IT=Italy, PL=Poland, TW=Taiwan, DE=Germany.

evidence.raw_text: FR, DK, SE, LT, SK, IT, PL, TW
FR, DK, SE, DE, LT, SK, IT, PL, TW (from Origin column across pages 2–3)
The exporter of the products covered by this document (customs authorization No. SE/TTA/013168) declares that, except where otherwise clearly indicated, these products are of EU preferential origin.

checkpoints.motivation: Certificate lists origins FR, DK, SE, LT, SK, IT, PL, TW. All 8 countries are explicitly found in the invoice's per-item Origin column. The invoice contains one additional origin country DE (Germany, for item 23408454). DE is an EU member state. Per rule 4.5.4.1.2, when the certificate contains a mix of EU and non-EU countries, and the only extra countries in the invoice are EU member states, the result is MATCH. All certificate countries verified; no extra non-EU countries found in invoice. The EU preferential origin declaration in the invoice footer corroborates EU origin for the EU-origin items.
checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3: 'FR, DK, SE, LT, SK, IT, PL, TW'. Invoice Origin column has items with origins: FR, FR, DK, SE, SE, SE, SE, SE, DK, FR (wait — let me recheck). Page 2: 40869954=FR, 23172853=DK, 24596110=SE, 24596128=SE, 24596129=SE, 24180372=DK, 21233011=FR. Page 3: 23408454=DE, 24141904=SE, 874414=LT, 24824911=SK, 23576708=SE, 23407160=IT, 24663774=SK, 21166003=LT, 23561740=LT, 3588206=PL, 23316639=TW, 23975324=TW, 24125545=SE. Unique invoice origins: FR, DK, SE, DE, LT, SK, IT, PL, TW. Certificate origins: FR, DK, SE, LT, SK, IT, PL, TW. All cert origins found. Extra: DE (EU member). Per 4.5.4.1.2 → MATCH. Note: The certificate is an EU Certificate of Origin (titled 'EUROPEAN UNION CERTIFICATE OF ORIGIN') — this implicitly covers EU origin, supporting the application of 4.5.4.1.2.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MISMATCH because invoice contains DE which is not listed in certificate origins
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Per rule 4.5.4.1.2, when the certificate lists a mix of EU and non-EU countries and all certificate countries are found in the invoice, extra EU member state countries in the invoice do not constitute a MISMATCH. DE (Germany) is an EU member state. All certificate origins are verified in the invoice. Therefore MATCH.

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: No LC reference found. Normal verification applies.

Certificate file (Document A) pages 1–3: certificate (Original + 2 copies). Pages 4–6 contain invoice embedded in certificate file — NOT used for verification per 8.5.0. Invoice file (Document B) pages 1–3: invoice 61622218/1S. Verification uses Document A page 1 (Original cert) + Document B pages 1–3 (invoice).
PASS. All three criteria met: (1) Invoice number 61622218/1S matches, (2) Consignor AB Volvo Penta matches, (3) Consignee ORASCOM FREE ZONE matches.
AB Volvo Penta found in invoice Legal Company Address, Mu Office info, Tax ID/Tax Agent blocks, and header. Direct match — no need for sequential testing 4.1.3.1–4.1.3.6.
Invoice has dedicated Consignee field matching certificate consignee. MATCH.
Certificate references invoice 61622218/1S dated 25/02/2026 with 'See attached invoice' formula. Reference and date verified. Content compatible. MATCH.
GW 4469 KG found as Total Gross Weight 4469.00 KG. MATCH.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Extended EU normalization for mixed EU/non-EU origin lists
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: All certificate origins found in invoice. Extra DE is EU member. MATCH.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer överens. Avsändaren AB Volvo Penta, mottagaren Orascom Free Zone i Alexandria, varubeskrivningen (dieselmotor med tillbehör), bruttovikten 4469 kg och ursprungsländerna kan alla verifieras mot fakturan. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.
overall_assessment.summary: Certificate of Origin SEG-26D-463229 issued by AB Volvo Penta (Sweden) for ORASCOM FREE ZONE (Egypt). All five checkpoints verified successfully: consignor matches, consignee matches via dedicated Consignee field, goods description verified via invoice reference 61622218/1S, gross weight 4469 KG matches exactly, and all 8 origin countries (FR, DK, SE, LT, SK, IT, PL, TW) confirmed in invoice. One extra EU origin (DE) in invoice is acceptable per EU normalization rules.
warnings: Goods description differs textually: certificate says 'Industrial Diesel Engine' while invoice says 'Marine Leisure Diesel Engine'. Accepted via invoice reference rule 4.3.5.
Invoice contains origin DE (Germany) not listed in certificate — accepted as extra EU member state per rule 4.5.4.1.2.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura

sections.certificate_value: AB Volvo Penta, Terminalvägen, ARK-S, Gropegårdsgatan 11, SE-405 08, Gothenburg, Sweden
sections.invoice_value: AB Volvo Penta, Gropegårdsgatan 11, 40508 Göteborg, Sweden
sections.rule_applied: Direkt namnmatchning – AB Volvo Penta identiskt i båda dokumenten
sections.motivation: Företagsnamnet 'AB Volvo Penta' och landet 'Sweden' matchar exakt mellan certifikat och faktura.

sections.certificate_value: ORASCOM FREE ZONE, EL AMIRIA, ALEXANDRIA, Egypt
sections.invoice_value: Consignee: ORASCOM FREE ZONE, EL AMIRIA, ALEXANDRIA, Egypt
sections.rule_applied: Fakturan har ett dedikerat Consignee-fält som matchar certifikatets mottagare exakt
sections.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare 'ORASCOM FREE ZONE EL AMIRIA ALEXANDRIA' återfinns exakt i fakturans Consignee-fält. Land Egypt matchar. ACID och Tax ID bekräftar kopplingen.

sections.certificate_value: Industrial Diesel Engine & Accessories / See attached invoice:61622218/1S, dated: 25/02/2026
sections.invoice_value: Marine Leisure Diesel Engine & Accessories / Invoice 61622218/1S, 2026-02-25
sections.rule_applied: Generell varubeskrivning med explicit fakturareferens – fakturanummer och datum verifierade
sections.motivation: Certifikatet hänvisar uttryckligen till faktura 61622218/1S daterad 25/02/2026. Fakturanummer och datum matchar exakt. Fakturans innehåll (dieselmotorer med tillbehör) är förenligt med certifikatets beskrivning.
Certifikatets GW 4469 KG matchar fakturans Total Gross Weight 4469.00 KG exakt. Viktkategori (GW/Gross Weight) och enhet (KG) överensstämmer.

sections.certificate_value: FR, DK, SE, LT, SK, IT, PL, TW
sections.invoice_value: FR, DK, SE, DE, LT, SK, IT, PL, TW (per artikelrad); EU preferential origin deklaration
sections.rule_applied: Samtliga certifikatets ursprungsländer identifierade i fakturans Origin-kolumn. Extra EU-land (DE) accepterat.
sections.motivation: Alla 8 ursprungsländer i certifikatet (FR, DK, SE, LT, SK, IT, PL, TW) återfinns explicit i fakturans Origin-kolumn. Fakturan innehåller ett ytterligare ursprungsland DE (Tyskland) som inte finns i certifikatet, men DE är EU-medlemsstat och accepteras per EU-normaliseringsreglerna för blandade listor.

output_quality_checks.consistency_details: All 5 checkpoints are MATCH. comparison_result is IDENTICAL. workflow_recommendation is AUTO_APPROVAL_ELIGIBLE. No checkpoint has confidence below 0.85. All motivations are consistent with status values.
output_quality_checks.confidence_floor_details: Lowest checkpoint confidence is 0.90 (goods description) which is above the 0.85 threshold for IDENTICAL.
